title: Legal Status of Expedited Partner Therapy (EPT) | STI | CDC
text:
very state’s page reflects the most recent date that any law referenced on that page went into effect, even minor changes. Summary Totals are here. 
EPT is permissible in 48 states 
EPT is also permissible in the District of Columbia and in the Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands .
Legal Status of EPT in Alabama 
EPT is permissible in Alabama.

EPT is permissible in Alaska.
